name: Outrageously Oatmeal Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring all ingredients to room temperature and pour into a bakery bowl in order.
2. Set the baking control at 11 o'clock. Select "white bread" and press Start.
3. For added texture, add oats after the first knead or at the beep on the fruit and nut cycle.
4. For additional crunch, sprinkle a few oats on top of the loaf after the final rise.
5. Substitute applesauce for the fat with no problems.
